mapper.insert: INSERT INTO os_metric_raw ( instance_id, collected_at, details, created_at ) VALUES ( #{instanceId}, #{collectedAt}, #{details, typeHandler=com.dajanggan.global.config.JsonbTypeHandler}::jsonb, NOW() )

INSERT INTO os_metric_raw ( instance_id, collected_at, details, created_at ) VALUES
( #{item.instanceId}, #{item.collectedAt}, #{item.details, typeHandler=com.dajanggan.global.config.JsonbTypeHandler}::jsonb, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT os_metric_raw_id, instance_id, collected_at, details->>'metricType' as metric_type, details, created_at FROM os_metric_raw WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND details->>'metricType' = #{metricType} AND collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} ORDER BY collected_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO os_metric_agg_1m ( instance_id, collected_at, avg_cpu_usage, avg_memory_usage, avg_disk_used_bytes, avg_disk_total_bytes, avg_net_rx_bytes, avg_net_tx_bytes, record_count, created_at ) VALUES ( #{instanceId}, #{collectedAt}, #{avgValue}, #{avgValue}, #{avgValue}, #{maxValue}, #{avgValue}, #{avgValue}, #{sampleCount}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT os_metric_agg_1m_id, instance_id, collected_at, #{metricType} as metric_type, CASE WHEN #{metricType} = 'CPU' THEN avg_cpu_usage WHEN #{metricType} = 'MEMORY' THEN avg_memory_usage WHEN #{metricType} = 'DISK_USAGE' THEN (avg_disk_used_bytes::float / NULLIF(avg_disk_total_bytes, 0) * 100) WHEN #{metricType} = 'DISK_READ' THEN avg_net_rx_bytes::float WHEN #{metricType} = 'DISK_WRITE' THEN avg_net_tx_bytes::float ELSE NULL END as avg_value, CASE WHEN #{metricType} = 'CPU' THEN avg_cpu_usage WHEN #{metricType} = 'MEMORY' THEN avg_memory_usage WHEN #{metricType} = 'DISK_USAGE' THEN (avg_disk_used_bytes::float / NULLIF(avg_disk_total_bytes, 0) * 100) WHEN #{metricType} = 'DISK_READ' THEN avg_net_rx_bytes::float WHEN #{metricType} = 'DISK_WRITE' THEN avg_net_tx_bytes::float ELSE NULL END as max_value, CASE WHEN #{metricType} = 'CPU' THEN avg_cpu_usage WHEN #{metricType} = 'MEMORY' THEN avg_memory_usage WHEN #{metricType} = 'DISK_USAGE' THEN (avg_disk_used_bytes::float / NULLIF(avg_disk_total_bytes, 0) * 100) WHEN #{metricType} = 'DISK_READ' THEN avg_net_rx_bytes::float WHEN #{metricType} = 'DISK_WRITE' THEN avg_net_tx_bytes::float ELSE NULL END as min_value, record_count as sample_count, created_at FROM os_metric_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} ORDER BY collected_at ASC
SELECT instance_id FROM monitor_instance ORDER BY instance_id ASC

SELECT collected_at, CASE WHEN #{metricType} = 'CPU' THEN avg_cpu_usage WHEN #{metricType} = 'MEMORY' THEN avg_memory_usage WHEN #{metricType} = 'DISK_USAGE' THEN (avg_disk_used_bytes::float / NULLIF(avg_disk_total_bytes, 0) * 100) WHEN #{metricType} = 'DISK_READ' THEN avg_net_rx_bytes::float WHEN #{metricType} = 'DISK_WRITE' THEN avg_net_tx_bytes::float ELSE NULL END AS avg_value, CASE WHEN #{metricType} = 'CPU' THEN avg_cpu_usage WHEN #{metricType} = 'MEMORY' THEN avg_memory_usage WHEN #{metricType} = 'DISK_USAGE' THEN (avg_disk_used_bytes::float / NULLIF(avg_disk_total_bytes, 0) * 100) WHEN #{metricType} = 'DISK_READ' THEN avg_net_rx_bytes::float WHEN #{metricType} = 'DISK_WRITE' THEN avg_net_tx_bytes::float ELSE NULL END AS usage_percent, CASE WHEN #{metricType} = 'CPU' THEN avg_cpu_usage WHEN #{metricType} = 'MEMORY' THEN avg_memory_usage WHEN #{metricType} = 'DISK_USAGE' THEN (avg_disk_used_bytes::float / NULLIF(avg_disk_total_bytes, 0) * 100) WHEN #{metricType} = 'DISK_READ' THEN avg_net_rx_bytes::float WHEN #{metricType} = 'DISK_WRITE' THEN avg_net_tx_bytes::float ELSE NULL END AS max_value, CASE WHEN #{metricType} = 'CPU' THEN avg_cpu_usage WHEN #{metricType} = 'MEMORY' THEN avg_memory_usage WHEN #{metricType} = 'DISK_USAGE' THEN (avg_disk_used_bytes::float / NULLIF(avg_disk_total_bytes, 0) * 100) WHEN #{metricType} = 'DISK_READ' THEN avg_net_rx_bytes::float WHEN #{metricType} = 'DISK_WRITE' THEN avg_net_tx_bytes::float ELSE NULL END AS min_value, record_count AS sample_count FROM os_metric_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= #{startTime} AND collected_at <= #{endTime} ORDER BY collected_at ASC
